description: Open-source AI-assisted condition report for used farm equipment with phone capture, serial/model cross-reference, NVIDIA/Hermes/Stripe positioning, and anti-vendor-lock portable records.

userStories.title: FarmFax strategic shell and sponsor positioning
userStories.description: As a hackathon judge, I need to immediately understand FarmFax, why NVIDIA/Hermes/Stripe matter, and why this is not vendor-lock slop.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero states AI pre-purchase inspection for farm equipment
NVIDIA/Nemotron, Hermes, and Stripe each have clear non-forced roles
Open-source anti-vendor-lock principle is visible above the fold or in primary flow
userStories.notes: Implemented and verified via npm run build + browser smoke test.

userStories.title: Phone-guided inspection input
userStories.description: As a buyer/seller, I need a guided mobile capture checklist that treats the phone as the trusted input device.
acceptanceCriteria: UI includes required capture slots for walkaround, serial plate, hour meter, hydraulics, tires/tracks, paint/body, and engine bay
Each capture slot has accepted/needs-review/missing state
User can upload images into slots in browser
userStories.notes: Implemented and verified via npm run build + browser smoke test.

userStories.title: Visual defect and identity catalog
userStories.description: As a buyer, I need visible rust/paint/leak/wear detections, OCR-like serial/hour extraction, and make/model cross-reference candidates.
acceptanceCriteria: App displays simulated/evidence-first detection overlays for rust, paint mismatch, leaks, and wear
App displays serial number, hour meter, and make/model candidates with confidence
Every finding includes confidence and evidence slot reference
userStories.notes: Implemented and verified via npm run build + browser smoke test.

userStories.title: Consolidated portable report and Stripe unlock
userStories.description: As a user, I need a consolidated FarmFax report that can be exported/shared and monetized without locking the equipment record.
acceptanceCriteria: Report includes condition score, red/yellow/green findings, buyer questions, missing evidence, and open record export language
Stripe checkout modal explains paid verification/storage while preserving owner export rights
userStories.notes: Implemented and verified via npm run build + browser smoke test.
